title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif (Cursor co-founder) interviews Simon Eskildsen (turbopuffer CEO) on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, why new database companies succeed cyclically, AI coding limitations, and hiring P99 engineers in the AI era. Topics include flash sale scaling, on-call engineering principles, and the future of databases.
